_meta.description: Editor-approved photos and videos for the public evidence gallery.
_meta.publicationRule: Only reviewed items marked approved belong in this file.

imageIntegrity.decisionRule: Exact and perceptual matches require human review so additional witness provenance is not discarded.

items.eventTitle: X post alleges Delhi Police hit a 10-year-old during protest
items.caption: The submitted X post says Delhi Police slapped and hit a 10-year-old boy during the protest.
The submitted Instagram Reel identifies the scene as the Jantar Mantar protest on 20 July.
